name: create-mcp-app
tagline: Reference guide for building interactive MCP Apps (tool + HTML resource) from scratch across multiple frameworks.
verdict: Clear, example-rich reference covering lifecycle, styling, and streaming patterns with consistent conventions. Missing: a NOT-for scope note, failure handling for install/build/testing steps, and any version or changelog signal.

highlights.summary: `npm install @modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps ...` unpinned, with 'Never specify version numbers from memory' (line 112).
No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope section anywhere in description or body.
No handling anywhere for npm install, build, or basic-host connect failures across the multi-step flow.
